title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at GKB Opticals - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at GKB Opticals - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the GKB Opticals family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Chennai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About GKB Opticals:
GKB Opticals is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GKB Opticals!
